name: persona-sim
description: Simulate feedback from census-grounded virtual populations. Panel-score product/copy, predict votes with IPF post-stratification, or run what-if social-sandbox experiments. Ships with 4 skills (core + product-feedback / vote-predict / social-sandbox), a bias audit module, and 6 eval suites (GSS, BFI, test-retest, diversity, demo-correlation, bias-audit).
